title: The Crew Sails On
description: On pages 17–19, the crew sails on focuses on Nami, Luffy, Zoro, Usopp as the village celebrates after Arlong’s defeat while Nami prepares to leave her home behind.
scene: On pages 17–19, the crew sails on focuses on Nami, Luffy, Zoro, Usopp as the village celebrates after Arlong’s defeat while Nami prepares to leave her home behind.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: She sure got us good!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I should've known better from my own sister.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: have fun.

dialogue.speaker: Genzo
dialogue.text: Hey, Genzou...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hm? What's this, doc?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: She got herself another tattoo.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What is it?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: She said it's an "Orange,"

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: and a "pinwheel."

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Huh? What happened to your pinwheel, gen?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Haha... I didn't need it anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WaHahah!

dialogue.speaker: Genzo
dialogue.text: Gen! Stay away from my Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: B-B-But even I want to see a baby's cute smile.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But your face is so scary you're making her cry!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well, it's not like I can do anything about that...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How about this!? With this, I'm sure she'll smile!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: All I have to do is put this on my head from now on!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well? Can you smile for me, Nami?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I don't know, Gen. Even if you put a pinwheel...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: KyaHa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The skies are clear and the winds mild.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ah, she laughed...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Perfect weather for a pinwheel to spin.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Stairs (entrance From Storage Room)

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Liquor

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This bar was installed by Toru-san, a carpenter in Cocolashi:

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hammock Storage (Pulling rope oil the wall lets hammock down);

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Bookshelf

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: . Clean.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Treasure Chest (High quality treasure, Nam's collection)

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Emergency Exit (Conflects to Neil's Room, normally unused)

summary: This part releases the tension of Arlong Park through celebration, goodbye, and Nami’s choice to sail with the crew.
